reason: The sole finding is a false positive. s4 accurately and completely reproduces the source RST, which contains exactly one bullet point of the same length. The checker's 50-character minimum is a heuristic that does not apply when the source section itself is inherently brief. No information is missing; the knowledge file is correct.

findings_assessment.justification: The section content faithfully reflects the source RST, which contains a single prerequisite bullet point of the same length. There is no information gap — adding content would require hallucinating text not present in the source. The 50-character threshold is a heuristic; when the authoritative source is this short, the threshold is inapplicable. The finding persisted through Phase E because the fix agent correctly identified it as a false positive and declined to pad the section with fabricated content.
